      "question": "What is the primary function of the decoder in the Encoder-Decoder Model?",
      "options": ["A) To generate the input sequence", "B) To generate the output sequence", "C) To translate the source language to the target language", "D) To predict the probability of the next word"],
      "correct": 2,
